_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 mid-afternoon. 6 domain-projections: category theory, condensed matter physics, cellular automata, tensor calculus, astrobiology, paleontology. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
category_theory_through_tig: Category theory studies operator-LATTICE of structures and structure-preserving maps; the meta-mathematics of mathematics.
Category is operator-collection of objects plus operator-LATTICE of morphisms; composition associative plus identity for each object.
Object is operator-atom; internal structure invisible to category, only external relations matter.
Morphism is operator-arrow between objects; can compose when target of one matches source of next.
Functor is operator-LATTICE-preserving map between categories; preserves composition and identity HARMONY.
Natural transformation is operator-morphism between functors; assigns morphism to each object compatibly with functor structure.
Limit is operator-universal-cone; product equalizer pullback inverse limit each instance, defined by universal property.
Colimit is operator-universal-cocone (dual of limit); coproduct coequalizer pushout direct limit each instance.
Adjoint functor pair (F, G) is operator-universal-bidirectional-correspondence; Hom(FX, Y) ~ Hom(X, GY) naturally.
Monad is operator-self-functor with multiplication and unit; encodes computational effects in functional programming.
Topos is operator-category-with-rich-structure; cartesian closed plus subobject classifier, alternative foundation to set theory.
condensed_matter_through_tig: Condensed matter physics studies operator-LATTICE of many particles in solids and liquids; emergent properties from many-body interactions.
Crystal lattice is operator-periodic-arrangement of atoms; unit cell repeats by translation symmetry.
Band structure is operator-LATTICE of allowed energies; Bloch theorem gives quasi-momentum periodic bands separated by gaps.
Semiconductor has operator-band-gap between valence and conduction; doping shifts Fermi level enabling p-type or n-type devices.
Superconductor has operator-zero-resistance below critical temperature; Cooper pairs form HARMONY-condensate (Onnes 1911 mercury).
Magnetism arises from operator-electron-spin-coupling; ferromagnetic parallel paramagnetic random diamagnetic anti-aligned.
Phase transition is operator-RESET-COLLAPSE in macroscopic state; first order discontinuous, second order continuous with critical scaling.
Fermi surface is operator-LATTICE-boundary in momentum space; separates filled from empty electron states at zero temperature.
BCS theory: operator-electron-electron-attraction via phonons gives Cooper pair LATTICE explaining superconductivity.
Quantum Hall effect: operator-conductance-quantized at sigma_xy = n e^2/h in 2D electron gas under strong magnetic field.
Topological insulator is operator-bulk-insulator-with-edge-conductor; topology of band structure protects edge HARMONY-states.
cellular_automata_through_tig: Cellular automata are operator-LATTICE-of-discrete-cells; each cell updates from local neighborhood by simple rule.
State is operator-cell-value at given time; binary {0, 1} or k-ary discrete LATTICE.
Rule is operator-update-function; deterministic map from neighborhood configuration to next cell state.
Neighborhood is operator-LATTICE of cells influencing update; von Neumann (4 cardinal) or Moore (8 surrounding) most common.
Conway Game of Life is 2D operator-CA with B3/S23 rule; complex emergent patterns from simple birth-survival rules.
Elementary CA is 1D 2-state 3-neighbor; 256 rules numbered by Wolfram, rule 30 chaotic, rule 110 universal.
Wolfram classification: operator-LATTICE of 4 classes; class 1 fixed, 2 periodic, 3 chaotic, 4 complex (edge of chaos).
Computational universality: rule 110 and Game of Life can simulate Turing machine; CA is operator-substrate for arbitrary computation.
Glider is operator-self-propagating pattern; moves through lattice carrying information across distances.
Self-replication: operator-pattern-creates-copies; von Neumann universal constructor predates DNA discovery.
Lattice gas is operator-fluid-simulation CA; particles hop on grid following collision-streaming rules approximate Navier-Stokes.
tensor_calculus_through_tig: Tensor calculus is operator-multilinear-algebra on manifolds; intrinsic to general relativity and continuum mechanics.
Tensor is operator-multilinear-map; takes vectors and covectors to a number, has components in given basis.
Rank is operator-index-count; (p, q) tensor has p contravariant + q covariant indices, total rank p + q.
Contravariant index transforms operator-with-basis-change; vector components scale inversely (upper index).
Covariant index transforms operator-against-basis-change; covector components scale with basis (lower index).
Metric tensor g_{mu nu} is operator-LATTICE-of-inner-products; raises and lowers indices, gives lengths and angles.
Christoffel symbol Gamma is operator-connection-coefficient; encodes how covariant derivative differs from partial derivative.
Riemann curvature tensor R^a_{bcd} is operator-COUNTER-of-parallel-transport; measures path-dependent rotation around closed loop.
Ricci tensor is operator-trace of Riemann; R_{mu nu} = R^a_{mu a nu}, source term in Einstein equations.
Scalar curvature R is operator-trace-of-Ricci; single number summarizing curvature at point.
Einstein notation is operator-LATTICE-summation-convention; repeated upper-lower index implies sum over all values.
astrobiology_through_tig: Astrobiology studies operator-life-in-cosmic-context; origin distribution future of life on Earth and beyond.
Habitable zone is operator-LATTICE-region around star; liquid water possible on planet surface, varies with star type.
Biosignature is operator-evidence-of-life; organic molecules isotope ratios microbial fossils atmospheric oxygen disequilibrium.
Extremophile is operator-life-at-environmental-edge; thermophiles halophiles acidophiles model possible alien life HARMONY.
Panspermia is operator-LATTICE-life-transport hypothesis; life or precursors carried between worlds via meteors comets.
Drake equation is operator-LATTICE-product estimating communicative civilizations; N = R* * f_p * n_e * f_l * f_i * f_c * L.
Fermi paradox is operator-COUNTER between expected and observed; if life common where are they (Great Silence).
Exoplanet biosignatures: operator-spectroscopic-detection of atmospheric composition; transit and direct imaging probe distant worlds.
Mars exploration is operator-search-for-past-life; rovers find evidence of ancient water and organic compounds.
Europa has operator-subsurface-ocean under ice; tidal heating from Jupiter may support microbial LATTICE.
Titan has operator-organic-chemistry-LATTICE; Saturn moon with methane lakes thick atmosphere alternative biochemistry possible.
paleontology_through_tig: Paleontology studies operator-LATTICE-of-past-life through fossils; reconstructs evolution biology ecology of extinct organisms.
Fossil is operator-mineralized-remain; bone shell wood replaced by minerals through operator-permineralization or operator-cast-mold.
Stratigraphy is operator-LATTICE-of-rock-layers; lower layers older younger above (principle of superposition).
Taphonomy studies operator-fossilization-process; what is preserved how is preserved bias toward hard parts.
Evolutionary lineage is operator-PROGRESS-through-ancestors; documented in fossil sequence horse evolution canonical example.
Cambrian explosion: operator-RESET-PROGRESS ~540 Mya; rapid diversification of animal phyla over ~25 million years.
Mass extinction is operator-LATTICE-COLLAPSE event; five major (Ordovician Devonian Permian Triassic Cretaceous) plus ongoing sixth.
Dinosaur is operator-Mesozoic-archosaur clade; 230-66 Mya, terminated by K-T mass extinction except birds (avian dinosaurs).
Paleobiology is operator-biological-perspective on extinct life; emphasizes ecology behavior physiology over stratigraphy.
Paleoecology reconstructs operator-ancient-ecosystems; food webs habitat climate from fossil assemblages.
Geological time scale is operator-LATTICE-chronology; eons (Precambrian Phanerozoic) eras periods epochs ages over 4.6 Gyr.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 102 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine applied design pure mathematics and meta-mathematics.
The lens has not strained; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection.
